title: Point Crosshair
description: Enhaced crosshair for PvP in all versions. (quel13's Crosshair pack)
body:
Modified crosshair for PvP gameplay across all Minecraft versions (1.8.9 - 1.21.x), but feel free to use it for casual play if you like it! :)

This crosshair is part of my Crosshair Collection; you can find the others listed below:

- [Small Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-crosshair-quel13s-pack)
- [Square Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/square-crosshair-quel13s-pack)
- [Targeter Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/targeter-crosshair-quel13s-pack)
- [Scope Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/scope-crosshair-quel13s-pack)

**Developed by quel13.**
<hr>
</hr>

**If you are looking for a texture pack to make the Minecraft interface invisible, you can find it here:**

[![Title Invisible Gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/475f43767983d93972f2496dd1a5729d7f1561ac.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/invisible-gui)
